description: Allowlist for business source files that are temporarily allowed above 500 lines. maxLines must be <= 1000.

entries.reason: DB bootstrap and migration helpers are still co-located before Unit 7 split.
Domain model files are being split in Unit 7.
Distribution command flow was extracted from commands.rs; deeper helper split is deferred after atomic cutover.
Skill support helpers were centralized during commands modularization; follow-up split can proceed after parity stabilization.
skills_manager API entry was separated from monolith and kept stable for command compatibility in Unit 6.
skills_usage parser remains dense after first modular extraction; staged split planned post-cutover.
local agent executor logic was isolated from monolith; fine-grained split is deferred to avoid behavior drift.
prompt translation pipeline extracted from monolith; keep temporary allowance during stabilization.
agent rules apply/retry/refresh command flow was split from monolith; helper-level extraction is deferred to a follow-up pass.
Workbench module orchestration was decomposed from monolith; additional split is planned in follow-up.
